Experimental method for the natTa(d,x)178W reaction
Natural metallic Hf (9.62 um thick) and Ta (25.0 um)
Stack containing target foils together with Ti monitor
foils were irradiated with 39.4 MeV alpha beam.
3 series of measurements with cooling time of
0.4-2.2 h, 3-4.5 h and 415-464 hours were done.
Energy degradation in the stack was calculated by
using the polynomial approximation of Andersen and

Uncertainty of the primary incident beam was +/-0.3 MeV
